title: acourtia molinana
intro: Acourtia molinana, also known as the Bolivian chamomile, is a perennial plant native to the Andean region, characterized by its small white flowers and feathery leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Acourtia molinana include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues. Acourtia molinana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for therapeutic purposes.
